mappingPolicy: ppwCaseId is populated only when a PPW case folder exists. proposedPpwCaseId records the intended canonical PPW target for source cases whose folders are missing.

candidateMappingsRequiringReview.notes: Reviewed in PPW #252. The current canonical Sacrifice Law corpus metadata identifies American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, and Hitler as source cases; it does not identify French Revolution as a source case. Do not create a Sacrifice Law subset link for revolutionary-france unless the source corpus metadata is revised or a specific French Revolution source subset is confirmed.

Reviewed in PPW #253. The current canonical Sacrifice Law corpus metadata identifies American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, and Hitler as source cases; it does not identify British World War I as a source case. The existing world-war-i-nationalisms case is broader than a British-only target, and no british-world-war-i PPW case should be created for Sacrifice Law unless the source corpus metadata is revised or a specific British World War I source subset is confirmed.
